name: Swiss Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen chopped broccoli - cooked, drained (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, sauté onion in butter until tender.
2. Stir in gravy, milk and broccoli; heat slowly, stirring occasionally.
3. Add cheese, salt and pepper; heat until cheese is melted, stirring frequently.
4. Makes 4 servings (about 4 cups).
